content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed open with NIFTY -0.48%, BANKNIFTY -0.69%, VIX +2.08% to 18.68 — elevated. However ENERGY +0.36% and select defence/realty/banking names gapping up post Q4 results. Heavy earnings session ahead with multiple binary catalysts on watchlist names (HAL May 14, GESHIP May 14, ANANTRAJ May 11). Book is well-positioned with several gappers in our favor — priority is locking in gains via SL trails, not adding more cluster risk.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23900,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD with current SL 1025 (already at breakeven+). Position +5.9%, CMP 1041.70. Trail-gap floor requires SL ≥1% below CMP = ≤1031.30. Current 1025 is 1.6% below CMP — within discipline. Bullish thesis (Q4 PAT +19%, MOFSL Buy, RBI easing) intact. Holding wide target 1110 still valid. No-op MODIFY by intent — capturing as HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "reasoning": "SL 1025 is 1.6% below CMP 1041.70 — within trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact. No change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.7%. SL 119 is 2.2% below CMP 121.78 — appropriate. Geopolitical hedge thesis still has option value (US-Iran ceasefire fragile). Allow trade to run to SL or recovery. No change to SL/target."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.75,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 23.85 is currently ABOVE CMP 24.01 (numerical: 23.85 < 24.01, so SL is just 0.66% below CMP — INSIDE trail-gap floor of 1%). Lowering SL is normally rejected (only tightening allowed for longs), so this would be rejected. Reverting: keep stored SL 23.85 — tight but already in discipline. Actually re-reading: 23.85 < 24.01 means SL is 0.66% below CMP — too tight per 1% trail-gap rule. But MODIFY only allows tightening, not loosening. The right action is HOLD; position will likely stop out on normal noise but rules prevent loosening. Switch to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "reasoning": "Reverting MODIFY above — guardrail forbids loosening SL on long. SL 23.85 vs CMP 24.01 = 0.66% gap, tighter than ideal 1% but cannot be widened. Accept that next downtick may stop out for small win; thesis (pharma sector outperform, lowest expense ratio sector ETF) intact otherwise."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +2.9%, CMP 1724.30 after gapping to ATH 1757. Q4 beat (PAT +9.4%, FY26 guide beat), Capital Group bought 25.6mn shares. Trail SL from 1715 to 1700 (entry/breakeven) — 1.4% below CMP, within trail-gap. Raise target from 1780 to 1820 reflecting brokerage target Rs 1900 and ATH momentum. New R:R from current: reward 95.7 / risk 24.3 = 3.9x. Still tightening overall risk envelope."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.2%, CMP 1519.70, SL 1510 (0.6% below CMP — tight). Board meeting May 14 = 7 sessions away (outside 3-session binary window per rule 11). Tanker rates elevated, bullish sector. Hold to SL 1510 or recovery. SL already at appropriate level; cannot loosen."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "reasoning": "Position -2.2% but CMP 13426 today recovering (+0.84%), record April sales +33% YoY, FY26 PAT all-time high. SL 13400 is 0.2% below CMP — extremely tight, but rules prevent loosening. Thesis intact; if SL trips on noise accept and move on. Q4 already announced (Apr 28), no near-term binary."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "reasoning": "Position -1.5% but CMP 205.07 (+2.68% today) recovering toward 52w high. Q4 PAT +68% YoY, NIM +30bps, GNPA down 140bps YoY — strong fundamentals. SL 204 is 0.5% below CMP — too tight per 1% rule but cannot loosen. Hold; cannot ratchet down."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "new_target": 4900.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT FLAG: Q4 results May 14 (7 sessions, OUTSIDE 3-session danger window). Position +1.4%, CMP 4614 after +6.35% rally today, 31% one-month run. SL 4575 (entry/BE) is 0.85% below CMP — at trail-gap edge. Cannot loosen (rules). Raise target from 4750 to 4900 reflecting Citi 5560/JM 4875 brokerage targets and 5-year breakout. Will re-evaluate to (a) exit pre-results once we approach 3 sessions to May 14."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 506.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT FLAG: Q4 board meeting May 11 — 4 sessions away, JUST OUTSIDE 3-session window but close. Plus active ED PMLA raid overhang (governance flag). Position +1.9%, CMP 516.70. SL 506 (entry/BE) is 2.1% below CMP — appropriate trail-gap. NO MODIFY needed — values unchanged. Switch to HOLD with note: must EXIT or trim before May 8 close (pre-event 3-session line)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "reasoning": "Reverting MODIFY — values identical to stored. SL 506/target 540 unchanged. ED raid overhang + May 11 board meeting; mandatory pre-event review by May 8 (binary 3-session rule)."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1025.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1025 is 1.6% below CMP — within 1% trail-gap discipline. Thesis intact (Q4 PAT +19%, MOFSL Buy, RBI easing tailwind). No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at 119 (2.2% below CMP 121.78). Geopolitical hedge — let it run to SL or recovery."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "SL 23.85 only 0.66% below CMP 24.01 — tighter than ideal 1% gap but rules prevent loosening. Accept potential noise stopout."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 1715 to 1700 (entry/BE), raise target to 1820 reflecting institutional buying + ATH breakout + Capital Group block buy."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1510.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 1510 0.6% below CMP — tight but bullish tanker sector + Apr 30 ATH 1589 confirms uptrend. Board meeting May 14 still outside 3-session binary window."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 13400.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 13400 only 0.2% below CMP — too tight per discipline but cannot loosen. Q4 already past; record April sales fundamentals support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 204.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68%, 52w high. SL 204 only 0.5% below CMP — tight, cannot loosen. Strong fundamentals support hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 4575.00,
      "reasoning": "Keep SL at 4575 (entry/BE), raise target to 4900. Q4 results May 14 — must reassess by May 8 to exit/trim or tighten further (3-session binary rule)."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 506.00,
      "reasoning": "SL 506 = entry. ED PMLA raid governance overhang + Q4 board May 11. Must EXIT or trim by May 8 close (3 sessions before event)."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL/HFCL/VEDL/LALPATHLAB/SYNGENE all show extreme volume + price spikes today — extended, not chasing. ADANIGREEN/CESC/TATAPOWER would add to Power-cluster risk where I already hold via NTPC exposure indirectly; skipping. BAJAJ-AUTO has board catalyst within window — explicit no-touch per prior failure mode (Day-10). PETRONET clean Q4 + JPM upgrade + Hormuz tailwind is interesting but NIFTY -0.48% + VIX +2% is not the tape for fresh entries when book is already 47% deployed with multiple gappers needing management. MARUTI being held already covers auto exposure.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is +0.45% today, +0.54% experiment-to-date. 9 CNC positions deployed at 47% — comfortable. Three winners (PNBHOUSING +5.9%, ADANIPORTS +2.9%, ANANTRAJ +1.9%) and several recovering (HAL, BANDHANBNK, MARUTI gapping up today). Three SL levels are inside the 1% trail-gap floor (PHARMABEES, MARUTI, BANDHANBNK) — set at entry, cannot loosen, accept potential noise stopouts as cost of position-level discipline. Two upcoming binary catalysts: ANANTRAJ (May 11, with ED overhang) and HAL/GESHIP (May 14). Calendar reminder: by May 8 close, must decide EXIT vs trim vs tighten on ANANTRAJ; by May 11 close same for HAL and GESHIP. No new entries today — capital preservation and earnings calendar management dominate. VIX +2.08% to 18.68 is not adding-day tape."
}
